meta_description: Discover the 50 best leadership speakers for manufacturing in 2026. Find keynote speakers, facilitators, and coaches for your next manufacturing event.
alt_text: Best leadership speakers for manufacturing conferences and events in 2026
excerpt: Finding the right leadership speaker for a manufacturing conference, executive retreat, or plant leadership summit can transform how your teams think about culture, performance, and continuous improvement. This guide features the 50 best leadership speakers for manufacturing in 2026.

featured_people.name: Jonno White
featured_people.context_note: #1 featured, author of Step Up or Step Out

featured_people.name: Mark Graban
featured_people.context_note: 3x Shingo Award recipient, lean manufacturing expert

featured_people.name: Kathy Miller
featured_people.context_note: Women in Manufacturing Hall of Fame inductee

featured_people.name: Alden Mills
featured_people.context_note: #1 top virtual speaker per Entrepreneur magazine

featured_people.name: Lisa Ryan
featured_people.context_note: Host of The Manufacturers Network podcast

featured_people.name: Subir Chowdhury
featured_people.context_note: Thinkers50 Most Influential, NY Times recognized

featured_people.name: Patrick Lencioni
featured_people.context_note: Creator of Working Genius, Five Dysfunctions author
